name: Patti's Sweet & Sour Brisket
recipeInstructions:
The ingredients sound a little strange but it is really good; hope you like it!
1. In a 10-inch skillet, combine the undrained tomatoes, undrained kraut, applesauce, and brown sugar.
2. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat.
3. Add the brisket, spooning the mixture over the meat. Cover and simmer for 2½ to 3 hours or until the meat is tender. Spoon sauce occasionally.
4. Transfer the meat to a serving platter and keep warm. Skim off any fat from the pan juices.
5. In a separate bowl, combine cold water and cornstarch, then stir into the tomato mixture. Cook and stir until thickened and bubbly, about 2 more minutes. Serve as gravy.
